ddls:
CREATE TABLE "summoners" (
  "summoner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each summoner */,
  "summoner_name" TEXT /* Name of the summoner */,
  "account_creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the summoner account was created */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Current rank of the summoner (e.g., Bronze, Silver, Gold) */,
  "tier" TEXT /* Current tier of the summoner (e.g., IV, III, II) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summoner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "champions" (
  "champion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each champion */,
  "champion_name" TEXT /* Name of the champion */,
  "champion_type" TEXT /* Type of the champion (e.g., Marksman, Fighter, Assassin) */,
  "attack_damage" INTEGER /* Attack damage of the champion */,
  "ability_power" INTEGER /* Ability power of the champion */,
  "armor" INTEGER /* Armor of the champion */,
  "magic_resist" INTEGER /* Magic resist of the champion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("champion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "summoner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the summoner who played the game */,
  "champion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the champion played in the game */,
  "game_mode" TEXT /* Mode of the game (e.g., Ranked, Casual) */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of the game (e.g., Solo, Flex) */,
  "game_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the game in seconds */,
  "game_result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., Win, Loss) */,
  "game_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_champion_id FOREIGN KEY ("champion_id") REFERENCES champions ("champion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_summoner_id FOREIGN KEY ("summoner_id") REFERENCES summoners ("summoner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game statistic */,
  "summoner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the summoner who played the game */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "total_games" INTEGER /* Total number of games played */,
  "total_wins" INTEGER /* Total number of wins */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Win percentage */,
  "average_kills" REAL /* Average number of kills */,
  "average_deaths" REAL /* Average number of deaths */,
  "average_assists" REAL /* Average number of assists */,
  "average_gold" REAL /* Average gold earned */,
  "average_cs" REAL /* Average creep score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_summoner_id FOREIGN KEY ("summoner_id") REFERENCES summoners ("summoner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "summoner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the summoner who played the game */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "average_gold" REAL /* Average gold earned */,
  "killing_spree" REAL /* Killing spree */,
  "max_largest_critical_strike" INTEGER /* Max largest critical strike */,
  "max_time_played" INTEGER /* Max time played */,
  "max_time_spent_living" INTEGER /* Max time spent living */,
  "average_damage_dealt" REAL /* Average damage dealt */,
  "average_damage_taken" REAL /* Average damage taken */,
  "average_heal" REAL /* Average heal */,
  "wards_placed" INTEGER /* Wards placed */,
  "wards_killed" INTEGER /* Wards killed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_performance_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_performance_summoner_id FOREIGN KEY ("summoner_id") REFERENCES summoners ("summoner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "advanced_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each advanced statistic */,
  "summoner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the summoner who played the game */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "average_magic_damage_done" REAL /* Average magic damage done */,
  "average_minions_killed" REAL /* Average minions killed */,
  "average_neutral_minions_killed" REAL /* Average neutral minions killed */,
  "average_turrets_killed" REAL /* Average turrets killed */,
  "average_inhibitors_killed" REAL /* Average inhibitors killed */,
  "average_dragons_killed" REAL /* Average dragons killed */,
  "average_baron_killed" REAL /* Average baron killed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_advanced_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_advanced_stats_summoner_id FOREIGN KEY ("summoner_id") REFERENCES summoners ("summoner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matchups" (
  "matchup_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each matchup */,
  "summoner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the summoner who played the game */,
  "opponent_summoner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent summoner who played the game */,
  "champion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the champion played in the game */,
  "opponent_champion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent champion played in the game */,
  "matchup_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the matchup */,
  "matchup_result" TEXT /* Result of the matchup (e.g., Win, Loss) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("matchup_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matchups_opponent_summoner_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_summoner_id") REFERENCES summoners ("summoner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matchups_opponent_champion_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_champion_id") REFERENCES champions ("champion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matchups_champion_id FOREIGN KEY ("champion_id") REFERENCES champions ("champion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matchups_summoner_id FOREIGN KEY ("summoner_id") REFERENCES summoners ("summoner_id")
)
